title: 10 best herbal teas for hormonal imbalance
description: Roselle teas helps with hormonal imbalance because it contains compounds like saponins and flavonoids that have a direct impact on hormone regulation. The tea's phytoestrogens, in particular, can mimic the effects of estrogen in the body, helping to balance out hormonal fluctuations and alleviate symptoms such as hot flashes and mood swings.
